title: Luna 6 ACC Performance得分：Car-to-Car / Motorcyclist / VRU / Road Features / Auto-
content: ACC Performance满分15。1V与1V1-4R得分相同：Car-to-Car 5.375/6、Car-to-Motorcyclist 3.75/5、Car-to-VRU 2/2、Road Features 0.6/1、Auto-resume 0.5/1，总计12.225/15。1V5R与5V5R12Uss提升至13.6/15，其中Car-to-Car升至5.875、Car-to-Motorcyclist升至4.625，其余项不变，表明雷达增强主要改善车辆/摩托车跟驰场景。
